text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both modestly higher over the past day, with BTC leading slightly at +1.8% while ETH trails at +1.5%, suggesting cautious buying rather than strong conviction. The Fear & Greed index sits at 23 (Extreme Fear) despite the small gains, and has only improved 10 points in a week, indicating that market psychology remains deeply pessimistic and most participants are still in defensive positioning. Bitcoin dominance at 56.2% paired with subdued 24-hour volume of $57B suggests thin liquidity and a lack of enthusiasm across the broader market—this is cautious stabilization, not recovery momentum.
